text.title: Video Async API — Procedure
text.summary: Five steps: submit with idempotency key → poll with backoff → fetch artefact → download to storage → audit + fallback if needed.

step.name: submit-with-idem-key
step.action: Compute key = sha256(prompt + params + provider). Submit with Idempotency-Key header. Receive job_id.
step.decision-gate: If submit returns 4xx other than rate limit — surface error; do not retry blindly (r1-idempotency-key).

step.name: poll-with-backoff
step.action: Loop: sleep, then GET status. Sleep = min(2^attempt, 30) + jitter. Stop on terminal status or total_wait_cap reached.
step.decision-gate: If timeout reached — trigger fallback (r3-total-wait-cap, r5-provider-fallback).

step.name: fetch-artefact
step.action: GET provider URL into a streaming download; do NOT retain URL as reference.
step.decision-gate: If download fails — retry within URL TTL; do not let URL expire (r4-download-before-expiry).

step.name: store-and-record
step.action: Upload to s3://media/yyyy/mm/dd/.mp4. Update VideoJob.artefact_url to internal S3 URI.

step.name: audit-and-fallback
step.action: Emit AuditEntry with cost + duration + outcome. On failure-permanent or timeout, repeat steps 1-4 with fallback provider using SAME idempotency key.
step.output: final VideoJob with success OR escalation
step.decision-gate: If even fallback fails — alert + queue for manual review.
